text:
Market today: Tech is the driver, but sentiment is shaky as we approach July 4th. Leveraged positions like SOXL are feeling the pinch.
Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM at -28.7% due to its leveraged decay and current status. QQQI is also TRIM at -1.86% as it's an income anchor under pressure.
Watch: Keep an eye on SMH. It's flagged as a BUY in the scanner and is a key semiconductor ETF.
Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged tech positions and watching the semiconductor ETF for potential signals.
plays: SOXL: TRIM/SELL at -28.7%. Consider reducing exposure given leverage and decay.
QQQI: TRIM at -1.86%. Monitor its status as an income anchor in this market.
SMH: Scanner shows BUY (9/12) with entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88. Consider if this aligns with your view.
